archimate:Meaning.name: EIRA Ontology
archimate:Meaning.documentation:
Definition: The [EIRA Ontology] ABB is a structured framework for describing the architecture of interoperable digital public services in the European Union, facilitating consistency and connectivity between different IT systems across member states.
Viewpoint: Enterprise Architecture Framework alignment guidelines viewpoint
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/EIRAOntologyMeaning
ABB name: eira:EIRAOntologyMeaning
EIRA concept: eira:ArchitectureBuildingBlock
Last modification: 2024-01-28
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/EIRAOntologyMeaning
Interoperability Layer: N/A

properties.value: Enterprise Architecture Framework alignment guidelines viewpoint

The [EIRA Ontology] ABB is a structured framework for describing the architecture of interoperable digital public services in the European Union, facilitating consistency and connectivity between different IT systems across member states.
